description: Composition:Red round neck, half sleeve t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWash Care:1.Light machine wash2.Do not scrub, bleach or dry clean3.Dry and warm iron on reverse Fitting:Regular FitGo beserk with feminity and add a tangy twist to your persoinality with this fluoroscent top in an A-line. It has a tie-up ribbon at the back, which adds that oomph to your attire.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.7', Chest-32”, Waist-26”
